dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Comprehensive overview of your immigration cases
dashboard.createFirstClient: Create your first client to get started
dashboard.submitCases: Submit cases to administrative authority to see them here
dashboard.requerimientoDesc: Pending to provide and correct file
dashboard.recursoDesc: Option 1: formal appeals you add (red). Option 2: post-silence administrative file (separate). Plus reminders.
dashboard.recursoModalOption1Desc: Court or formal contentious appeal only. You move a case here when you are actually pursuing that route — not for every file after silence.
dashboard.recursoModalOption2Desc: All submitted files that have finished the administrative silence period (e.g. ~3 months). This stays separate from Option 1: we do not go to court for every file — use Option 1 only when filing a formal appeal.
dashboard.recursoModalSectionSearchEmpty: No matching clients in this category.
dashboard.recursoModalSilenceOnlyHint: These cases are still in the administrative silence period. When silence ends, they will appear under Administrative file.
dashboard.urgentesDesc: Procedures that must be done in 72h max
dashboard.teamsToDoSelectMember: Tap a team member to view or add tasks
dashboard.teamsToDoNoTasks: No tasks yet. Use Create task to add one.
dashboard.aportarDocumentacionDesc: Add missing documents to the file
